response.text:
## 📋 6 vertical Commands Found

---

### **1. MEASUrement:MEAS<x>:REFLevel:ABSolute:HIGH**

**📋 Description:** This command sets or queries the high reference level, and is the upper reference level when MEASUre...

**📖 Details:** This command sets or queries the high reference level, and is the upper reference level when MEASUrement:MEAS<x>:REFLevel:METHod is set to Absolute. Measurements are specified by x, which ranges from 1 through 8.

**⚙️ Syntax:** **`MEASUrement:MEAS<x>:REFLevel:ABSolute:HIGH <NR3>`**

**🔧 Type:** both

**🏭 Supported Families:** MSO5000, DPO5000, DPO7000, DPO70000
---

### **2. MEASUrement:MEAS<x>:REFLevel:ABSolute:LOW**

**📋 Description:** This command sets or queries the low reference level, and is the lower reference level when MEASUrem...

**📖 Details:** This command sets or queries the low reference level, and is the lower reference level when MEASUrement:MEAS<x>:REFLevel:METHod is set to Absolute. Measurements are specified by x, which ranges from 1 through 8.

**⚙️ Syntax:** **`MEASUrement:MEAS<x>:REFLevel:ABSolute:LOW <NR3>`**

**🔧 Type:** both

**🏭 Supported Families:** MSO5000, DPO5000, DPO7000, DPO70000
---

### **3. MEASUrement:IMMed:REFLevel:ABSolute:HIGH**

**📋 Description:** This command sets or queries the high reference level, and is the upper reference level when MEASUre...

**📖 Details:** This command sets or queries the high reference level, and is the upper reference level when MEASUrement:IMMed:REFLevel:METHod is set to Absolute. Note that this command affects the results of rise and fall measurements.

**⚙️ Syntax:** **`MEASUrement:IMMed:REFLevel:ABSolute:HIGH <NR3>`**

**🔧 Type:** both

**🏭 Supported Families:** MSO5000, DPO5000, DPO7000, DPO70000
---

### **4. MEASUrement:IMMed:REFLevel:ABSolute:LOW**

**📋 Description:** This command sets or queries the low reference level, and is the zero percent level when MEASUrement...

**📖 Details:** This command sets or queries the low reference level, and is the zero percent level when MEASUrement:IMMed:REFLevel:METHod is set to Absolute. Note that this command affects the results of rise and fall measurements.

**⚙️ Syntax:** **`MEASUrement:IMMed:REFLevel:ABSolute:LOW <NR3>`**

**🔧 Type:** both

**🏭 Supported Families:** MSO5000, DPO5000, DPO7000, DPO70000
---

### **5. MEASUrement:MEAS<x>:REFLevel:PERCent:HIGH**

**📋 Description:** This command sets or queries the percentage (where 100% is equal to HIGH) used to calculate the high...

**📖 Details:** This command sets or queries the percentage (where 100% is equal to HIGH) used to calculate the high reference level when MEASUrement:MEAS<x>: REFLevel:METHod is set to Percent. Measurements are specified by x, which ranges from 1 through 8.

**⚙️ Syntax:** **`MEASUrement:MEAS<x>:REFLevel:PERCent:HIGH <NR3>`**

**🔧 Type:** both

**🏭 Supported Families:** MSO5000, DPO5000, DPO7000, DPO70000
---

### **6. MEASUrement:IMMed:REFLevel:PERCent:HIGH**

**📋 Description:** This command sets or queries the percentage (where 100% is equal to HIGH) used to calculate the high...

**📖 Details:** This command sets or queries the percentage (where 100% is equal to HIGH) used to calculate the high reference level when MEASUrement:IMMed:REFLevel: METHod is set to Percent. Note that this command affects the results of rise and fall measurements.

**⚙️ Syntax:** **`MEASUrement:IMMed:REFLevel:PERCent:HIGH <NR1>`**

**🔧 Type:** both

**🏭 Supported Families:** MSO5000, DPO5000, DPO7000, DPO70000
